_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Likewise, mice with SCF depletion in melanocytes (Scf flox/gfp; TyrCre ERT2) had no phenotype in hair color after validation of Cre expression in the hair matrix melanocytes
details: No phenotype in hair color when used to delete Scf in melanocytes after 4-hydroxytamoxifen induction at P0
